visa_types.name: Short stay-Work-Training
visa_types.documents_required:
All documentation must be original and translated into English by a certified translator.
All applicants must fill out a declaration form at the time of application. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3ABzPAGazqNxuI0ILjNNWy/a6b162f0fcab21da0991610c1d1ef681/Declaration-Form-Sep-2025.pdf)
Please do not glue or fasten documents with paper clips or staples.
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)
If You wish to apply for a Short stay-Work-Training, please visit Training visa - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-work-in-ireland/what-are-my-options-for-working-in-ireland/coming-to-work-for-less-than-90-days/training-visa/) for guidance on the required documentation. 
To assist you in your application, please find a non-exhaustive checklist of the documents required for your visa type. This checklist is intended as a guide only
The ISD WEBSITE Home - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/) is the main source of information for your visa requirements.
*In case of any discrepancy, the website takes precedence
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they have understood the application process and have submitted all documentation that is required.
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[irl > egy > en > Table:> Visa Fees 1]
This fee cannot be refunded if your application is refused or withdrawn.
Some applicants are exempt from the requirement to pay the visa fee. Check here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/preclearance-and-entry-visas-fees/) to see if the visa fee does not apply to you.
VFS charges 2537 EGP for service fees and scanning documents. Please note there are other optional services provided by VFS 
VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents (inclusive of VAT) is charged per visa application, in addition to the applicable visa fee. If you are not required to pay a visa application fee you will be required to pay the VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents only.
All fees can be paid in Cash or by Credit/Debit Card only in EGP at Visa Application Centre
visa_types.processing_time:
Generally, you can expect a decision within 8 weeks after we receive your documents.
Processing times differ between application offices and application types. This may also vary during the year. For example, during holiday periods.
Certain visa categories are processed in Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi, which can take different lengths of time
These processing times can change, you may check with the Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi for information on their current waiting times
Embassy Of Ireland, UAE | Ireland.ie | Ireland.ie (https://www.ireland.ie/en/uae/abudhabi/)
You are advised not to pay for a travel ticket before you receive a decision on your visa.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
If you are a visa required national you must apply for a visa before travelling to Ireland. You can find out if you need a visa here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-visit-ireland/visit-ireland-travel-path/). 
Each traveller must apply for a separate visa. There are no family visas.
All Applicants must come in person to apply for Irish visa
Should you wish to apply for a visa for Ireland, please complete the online visa application here (https://www.visas.inis.gov.ie/AVATS/OnlineHome.aspx). You will then need to print and sign the summary sheet.
Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.
Please consult the Documentation Required section for guidance on the visa requirements, It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 
It is the responsibility of the applicant to provide the necessary information that will enable us to grant you a visa/ process the visa application
Please note refunds are not possible for withdrawn or refused applications
Please note that multiple entry visas are only granted in limited circumstances.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
If you are a visa required national you must apply for a visa before travelling to Ireland. You can find out if you need a visa here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-visit-ireland/visit-ireland-travel-path/). 
Each traveller must apply for a separate visa. There are no family visas.
All Applicants must come in person to apply for Irish visa
Should you wish to apply for a visa for Ireland, please complete the online visa application here (https://www.visas.inis.gov.ie/AVATS/OnlineHome.aspx). You will then need to print and sign the summary sheet.
Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.
Please consult the Documentation Required section for guidance on the visa requirements, It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 
It is the responsibility of the applicant to provide the necessary information that will enable us to grant you a visa/ process the visa application
Please note refunds are not possible for withdrawn or refused applications
Please note that multiple entry visas are only granted in limited circumstances.

## Visa Fees

[irl > egy > en > Table:> Visa Fees 1]
This fee cannot be refunded if your application is refused or withdrawn.
Some applicants are exempt from the requirement to pay the visa fee. Check here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/preclearance-and-entry-visas-fees/) to see if the visa fee does not apply to you.
VFS charges 2537 EGP for service fees and scanning documents. Please note there are other optional services provided by VFS 
VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents (inclusive of VAT) is charged per visa application, in addition to the applicable visa fee. If you are not required to pay a visa application fee you will be required to pay the VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents only.
All fees can be paid in Cash or by Credit/Debit Card only in EGP at Visa Application Centre

## Documents Required
All documentation must be original and translated into English by a certified translator.
All applicants must fill out a declaration form at the time of application. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3ABzPAGazqNxuI0ILjNNWy/a6b162f0fcab21da0991610c1d1ef681/Declaration-Form-Sep-2025.pdf)
Please do not glue or fasten documents with paper clips or staples.
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)
If You wish to apply for a Short stay-Work-Training, please visit Training visa - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-work-in-ireland/what-are-my-options-for-working-in-ireland/coming-to-work-for-less-than-90-days/training-visa/) for guidance on the required documentation. 
To assist you in your application, please find a non-exhaustive checklist of the documents required for your visa type. This checklist is intended as a guide only
The ISD WEBSITE Home - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/) is the main source of information for your visa requirements.
*In case of any discrepancy, the website takes precedence
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they have understood the application process and have submitted all documentation that is required.
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 

## Minors
In case of a minor – both parents must attend the Visa Application Centre with the minor.
Both parents must sign this checklist at the Visa Application Centre.
Where there is only one guardian present, please provide relevant documentary evidence.

## Photo Specifications
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)

## Processing Time
Generally, you can expect a decision within 8 weeks after we receive your documents.
Processing times differ between application offices and application types. This may also vary during the year. For example, during holiday periods.
Certain visa categories are processed in Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi, which can take different lengths of time
These processing times can change, you may check with the Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi for information on their current waiting times
Embassy Of Ireland, UAE | Ireland.ie | Ireland.ie (https://www.ireland.ie/en/uae/abudhabi/)
You are advised not to pay for a travel ticket before you receive a decision on your visa.

## Online Application Form
Should you wish to apply for a visa for Ireland, please complete the online visa application here (https://www.visas.inis.gov.ie/AVATS/OnlineHome.aspx). You will then need to print and sign the summary sheet.
Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.

## Overview
If you are a visa required national you must apply for a visa before travelling to Ireland. You can find out if you need a visa here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-visit-ireland/visit-ireland-travel-path/).

Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.
Please consult the Documentation Required section for guidance on the visa requirements, It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 
It is the responsibility of the applicant to provide the necessary information that will enable us to grant you a visa/ process the visa application
Please note refunds are not possible for withdrawn or refused applications
Please note that multiple entry visas are only granted in limited circumstances.

## Visa Fees

[irl > egy > en > Table:> Visa Fees 1]
This fee cannot be refunded if your application is refused or withdrawn.
Some applicants are exempt from the requirement to pay the visa fee. Check here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/preclearance-and-entry-visas-fees/) to see if the visa fee does not apply to you.
VFS charges 2537 EGP for service fees and scanning documents. Please note there are other optional services provided by VFS 
VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents (inclusive of VAT) is charged per visa application, in addition to the applicable visa fee. If you are not required to pay a visa application fee you will be required to pay the VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents only.
All fees can be paid in Cash or by Credit/Debit Card only in EGP at Visa Application Centre

## Documents Required
All documentation must be original and translated into English by a certified translator.
All applicants must fill out a declaration form at the time of application. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3ABzPAGazqNxuI0ILjNNWy/a6b162f0fcab21da0991610c1d1ef681/Declaration-Form-Sep-2025.pdf)
Please do not glue or fasten documents with paper clips or staples.
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)
If You wish to apply for a Short stay-Work-Exam, please visit Exam visa - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-work-in-ireland/what-are-my-options-for-working-in-ireland/coming-to-work-for-less-than-90-days/exam-visa/) for guidance on the required documentation. 
To assist you in your application, please find a non-exhaustive checklist of the documents required for your visa type. This checklist is intended as a guide only
The ISD WEBSITE Home - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/) is the main source of information for your visa requirements.
*In case of any discrepancy, the website takes precedence
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they have understood the application process and have submitted all documentation that is required.
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 

## Minors
In case of a minor – both parents must attend the Visa Application Centre with the minor.
Both parents must sign this checklist at the Visa Application Centre.
Where there is only one guardian present, please provide relevant documentary evidence.

## Photo Specifications
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)

## Processing Time
Generally, you can expect a decision within 8 weeks after we receive your documents.
Processing times differ between application offices and application types. This may also vary during the year. For example, during holiday periods.
Certain visa categories are processed in Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi, which can take different lengths of time
These processing times can change, you may check with the Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi for information on their current waiting times
Embassy Of Ireland, UAE | Ireland.ie | Ireland.ie (https://www.ireland.ie/en/uae/abudhabi/)
You are advised not to pay for a travel ticket before you receive a decision on your visa.

## Online Application Form
Should you wish to apply for a visa for Ireland, please complete the online visa application here (https://www.visas.inis.gov.ie/AVATS/OnlineHome.aspx). You will then need to print and sign the summary sheet.
Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.

[irl > egy > en > Table:> Visa Fees 1]

Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.
Please consult the Documentation Required section for guidance on the visa requirements, It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 
It is the responsibility of the applicant to provide the necessary information that will enable us to grant you a visa/ process the visa application
Please note refunds are not possible for withdrawn or refused applications
Please note that multiple entry visas are only granted in limited circumstances.

## Visa Fees

[irl > egy > en > Table:> Visa Fees 1]
This fee cannot be refunded if your application is refused or withdrawn.
Some applicants are exempt from the requirement to pay the visa fee. Check here (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/preclearance-and-entry-visas-fees/) to see if the visa fee does not apply to you.
VFS charges 2537 EGP for service fees and scanning documents. Please note there are other optional services provided by VFS 
VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents (inclusive of VAT) is charged per visa application, in addition to the applicable visa fee. If you are not required to pay a visa application fee you will be required to pay the VFS Service Fees and Scanning documents only.
All fees can be paid in Cash or by Credit/Debit Card only in EGP at Visa Application Centre

## Documents Required
All documentation must be original and translated into English by a certified translator.
All applicants must fill out a declaration form at the time of application. Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3ABzPAGazqNxuI0ILjNNWy/a6b162f0fcab21da0991610c1d1ef681/Declaration-Form-Sep-2025.pdf)
Please do not glue or fasten documents with paper clips or staples.
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)
If You wish to apply for a Short stay-Work-Business, please visit Short stay business visa - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/coming-to-work-in-ireland/what-are-my-options-for-working-in-ireland/coming-to-work-for-less-than-90-days/short-stay-business-visa/) for guidance on the required documentation. 
To assist you in your application, please find a non-exhaustive checklist of the documents required for your visa type. This checklist is intended as a guide only
The ISD WEBSITE Home - Immigration Service Delivery (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/) is the main source of information for your visa requirements.
*In case of any discrepancy, the website takes precedence
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they have understood the application process and have submitted all documentation that is required.
It is the applicant’s responsibility to ensure they comply with these requirements. 

## Minors
In case of a minor – both parents must attend the Visa Application Centre with the minor.
Both parents must sign this checklist at the Visa Application Centre.
Where there is only one guardian present, please provide relevant documentary evidence.

## Photo Specifications
Include 2 passport-sized colour photographs of the visa applicant. Each photograph must meet all the following rules for visa photographs (https://www.irishimmigration.ie/photograph-rules-for-visa-applications/)

## Processing Time
Generally, you can expect a decision within 8 weeks after we receive your documents.
Processing times differ between application offices and application types. This may also vary during the year. For example, during holiday periods.
Certain visa categories are processed in Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi, which can take different lengths of time
These processing times can change, you may check with the Embassy of Ireland in Abu Dhabi for information on their current waiting times
Embassy Of Ireland, UAE | Ireland.ie | Ireland.ie (https://www.ireland.ie/en/uae/abudhabi/)
You are advised not to pay for a travel ticket before you receive a decision on your visa.

## Online Application Form
Should you wish to apply for a visa for Ireland, please complete the online visa application here (https://www.visas.inis.gov.ie/AVATS/OnlineHome.aspx). You will then need to print and sign the summary sheet.
Please keep your unique application number in order to book your VFS appointment.
Please ensure the IRL number used for booking the appointment is the same as your unique application number, as any mismatch will result in the cancellation of your appointment and will require you to book a new appointment using the correct IRL number.
